message:
Fall back to TUI_THEME env var when AM_TUI_THEME is unset

Allow users to set a generic TUI_THEME in their console env file, which
Agent Mail reads as a fallback when the AM_-prefixed variant is not
present. Enables sharing theme preference across multiple TUI tools
without per-tool configuration. Adds test for the fallback path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
